_comment: FiveCrux platform package map → Tebex package ids. Replace each 0 with the Tebex package id you create in FiveCrux's OWN store at the matching price (USD, must equal lib/ad-pricing.ts). Then set this whole object (minus _comment lines) as the TEBEX_PACKAGE_MAP_JSON env var. Keys: `${packageType}:${tier}:${duration}` (ads=months, featured-scripts=weeks).
